title: Create a Ghost

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1: appliance controller connect: wired or wireless switch fan or hairdryer

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Set the controller to direct mode so the fan runs while pressed.
2. Put white paint on black paper near the fan or hairdryer.
3. Prompt the switch user to press the switch to blow the paint upward.
4. Add googly eyes or glitter if desired.

tooltipText: Use an appliance controller to use a fan and paint to create a ghost
